description: Naming/article-precision gaps across gasterm/powergen/ehschem: 5 workflows cited informal '재난관리기본법' (canonical: 재난 및 안전관리 기본법, MST 283851); 6 workflows cited '위험물안전관리법' with no article number; 2 workflows (powergen/ash-chemical-waste-management, ehschem/environmental-monitoring) cited generic '환경보전법' matching neither of the two distinct environmental statutes tracked in the glossary; 1 workflow (powergen/renewable-energy-facility-safety) used the informal abbreviation '신재생에너지법' instead of the canonical statute name.
legal_basis: 재난 및 안전관리 기본법; 위험물안전관리법 제5조; 산업안전보건법 제125조
